chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 15 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.113/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.114/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 26.01.2023 Mr. Asif Ali Chang, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General <><><><>..<><><><> Mr. Manzoor Hussain Lashari, Advocate, files power on behalf of respondent No.5 (complainant of FIR No.164/2022), which is taken on record. Besides, the respondent No.3 files statement along with copy of statement of petitioner, namely, Mst. Sabira recorded under Section 161 Cr.P.C. Counsel for the petitioner through a statement files certified true copy of the two FIRs i.e. Crime No.164/2022 and 167/2022 registered at Police Station Faiz Ganj, District Khairpur, which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he has sought relief from this Court for quashment of FIR No.164/2022 and 167/2022 and since the FIR No.164/2022 is pertaining to the petitioner, hence, he does not press the quashment of the FIR No.167/2022. Inspector Khan Muhammad Shar / Respondent No.4 (Investigating Officer) SIO Police Station Faiz Ganj is present and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner Mst. Sabira, wherein she has categorically stated that she has not been abducted by any one and she has not contracted marriage with Page 2 of 2 respondent No.5, she intends to reside with her father, hence, shall file report under Section 173, Cr.P.C accordingly before the Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate concerned.

Inspector Khan Muhammad Shar / Respondent No.4 (Investigating Officer) SIO Police Station Faiz Ganj is present and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner Mst. Sabira, wherein she has categorically stated that she has not been abducted by any one and she has not contracted marriage with Page 2 of 2 respondent No.5, she intends to reside with her father, hence, shall file report under Section 173, Cr.P.C accordingly before the Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate concerned. Learned counsel for the petitioner on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer, does not press this petition, which stands disposed of along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
